reason: Browser use feature successfully executes browser commands and returns page information to the user
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the Super Agent interface with sidebar showing agents
Found and clicked on "QA-20260420-163000-w377" agent in the sidebar - Agent page opened showing chat interface, no sessions yet
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the input field - Message appeared in textbox, Send button became enabled
Clicked Send message button - Message was sent, agent status changed from "idle" to "working"
Waited up to 180 seconds for response - Agent responded within 9 seconds with complete result
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response shows "The page title is Example Domain." with browser preview panel displaying the actual page
